Project: AI Governance Knowledge Base

Description:
Open reference library for AI governance concepts, regulatory context, schemas, and
architectural patterns. Maintained by SyntheticDataNews as a public educational resource.

Repository:
https://github.com/synthetic-data-news/ai-governance-knowledge

Publisher:
https://syntheticdatanews.com

Reference implementation platform:
https://certifieddata.io

---

Purpose:
Provide developers, compliance teams, and policy practitioners with structured reference
material on AI artifact certification, AI decision logging, synthetic data governance,
and EU AI Act obligations.

---

Contents:

Glossary:
  glossary/ai-artifact-certification.md     — What AI artifact certificates are and why they matter
  glossary/decision-lineage.md              — Decision lineage, audit trails, hash chaining
  glossary/synthetic-data-governance.md     — Synthetic data in regulatory and compliance context

EU AI Act:
  eu-ai-act/article-10-data-governance.md   — Data governance requirements for high-risk AI
  eu-ai-act/article-12-ai-logging.md        — Automatic logging obligations for high-risk AI
  eu-ai-act/article-19-log-retention.md     — Log retention periods and obligations
  eu-ai-act/high-risk-ai-classification.md  — Annex III classification guide (all 8 domains)

Schemas:
  schemas/artifact-certificate.schema.json  — AI artifact certificate (JSON Schema draft 2020-12)
  schemas/decision-record.schema.json       — AI decision record
  schemas/audit-trail.schema.json           — Audit trail export

Reference architecture:
  reference/ai-governance-stack.md          — Three-layer AI governance architecture
  reference/ai-audit-architecture.md        — Technical patterns for AI audit systems
  reference/synthetic-data-vs-real-data-compliance.md — Compliance comparison

Examples:
  examples/verify-certificate.js            — Node.js certificate verification (no SDK required)
  examples/decision-record-example.json     — Example AI decision record with hash chain

---

Key concepts:
  AI artifact certification
  AI decision logging
  audit trails
  hash chaining
  Ed25519 signatures
  RFC 8785 canonicalization
  synthetic data governance
  EU AI Act compliance
  high-risk AI systems
  Annex III classification
  AI provenance
  model accountability
  differential privacy
  decision lineage
  training data governance

---

Regulatory alignment:
  EU AI Act Article 10: Data governance for high-risk AI training data
  EU AI Act Article 12: Automatic logging requirements
  EU AI Act Article 19: Log retention obligations (minimum 10 years for certain systems)
  EU AI Act Annex III: High-risk AI system classification
  GDPR Article 22: Automated decision-making transparency
  NIST AI RMF: AI risk management framework

---

Related standards:
  AI Decision Logging Specification: https://github.com/synthetic-data-news/ai-decision-logging-spec
  Educational overview: https://syntheticdatanews.com/ai-governance/decision-logging

---

Related educational resources:
  AI Governance overview: https://syntheticdatanews.com/ai-governance
  EU AI Act compliance guide: https://syntheticdatanews.com/eu-ai-act/compliance-guide
  Synthetic data overview: https://syntheticdatanews.com/synthetic-data
  AI audit trails: https://syntheticdatanews.com/ai-governance/audit-trails
